about.title: About Imagineering India
about.heroTitle: Built to Make Finding Reliable Services Effortless
about.heroDescription: Imagineering India connects businesses and individuals with verified service providers across construction, machinery, contractors, logistics, real estate, and allied services — all through a location-first, transparent, and execution-ready platform.
about.heroSubtext: Whether it’s sourcing heavy equipment, hiring a contractor, arranging logistics, or finding project-ready infrastructure, we help you connect with the right provider, at the right location, at the right time.
about.ctaDescription: Join thousands of satisfied customers and trusted providers on our platform today.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Have a question or need help? We're here to assist you. Choose the best way to reach us below.
contact.sendDescription: We'll get back to you as soon as possible
contact.subject: Subject
contact.emailDesc: Our team will respond within 24 hours

help.title: How Can We Help?
help.description: Search our knowledge base or browse categories below
